title: Stub (disambiguation)
content:
'''Stub''' can refer to:

==In-universe==
*[[Stub (clone pilot)|Stub]], a [[Clone trooper pilot]]
*[[Stub (Kouhun)|Stub]], a member of the [[Kouhun (order)|Kouhun]] [[assassin]]s

==Out of universe==
*[[Wookieepedia:Stub|Stub]], a type of [[Wookieepedia]] article that lacks detail and can be expanded

==Category==
*[[:Category:Stubs]]—Category for stub articles
*[[:Category:Stub templates]]—Category for stub templates, to be added to stub articles

{{Disambig}}
